top20_formula: severity_weight x confidence x blast_radius (simplified to severity_weight ranking here)

findings.claim: resolvePath() lookalike-prefix bypass (elevated from H1 per Oracle verdict)
findings.fix_direction: Harden isWithinDirectory() + regression tests; block next release

findings.claim: **`resolvePath()` does not reject lookalike-prefix paths on HEAD** â€” import/export path-guard regression; can redirect reads/writes outside approved home/project/tmp roots
findings.fix_direction: Reproduce with real Windows+POSIX lookalike cases, harden `isWithinDirectory()`, add regression tests

findings.claim: **Hybrid account selector returns unavailable accounts** â€” `selectHybridAccount()` falls back to LRU even when `available.length === 0`; fetch loop trusts it
findings.fix_direction: Change selector contract to return `null` when no account available OR re-run `isAccountAvailableForFamily()` after hybrid selection

findings.claim: **Short-window 429 retry does not mark account unavailable before sleeping** â€” concurrent requests keep selecting the same freshly rate-limited account
findings.fix_direction: Write immediate transient rate-limit marker before short-retry sleep OR reserve account locally until sleep window ends

findings.claim: **Live OAuth URL leaks to stdout/clipboard** â€” browser-fallback and manual login print raw URL with live `state` and `code_challenge`
findings.fix_direction: Print redacted display URL; keep full URL only for clipboard/open-browser handoff; add `--show-full-url` debug escape hatch

findings.claim: **Redirect host drift â€” code uses `localhost:1455` but docs claim `127.0.0.1:1455`**
findings.fix_direction: Choose one canonical callback origin; derive all user-facing strings from it; align docs/tests

findings.claim: **`npm run pack:check` FAILS exit=1** â€” pack budget violation; published tarball likely includes unintended files
findings.fix_direction: Inspect pack manifest; tighten `files` field in `package.json`; add CI gate on pack size delta

findings.claim: Project-scoped isolation silently bypassed when Codex CLI sync enabled â€” forces global storage
findings.fix_direction: Treat as hard config conflict with surfaced state; scope synced state per project identity

findings.claim: **Active-account pointer can dangle after disable** â€” `getActiveIndexForFamily()` clamps bounds only; `setAccountEnabled()` does not repair pointer
findings.fix_direction: Normalize active indices on every disable/remove; "active" means routable, not merely in-range

findings.claim: **`loadPluginConfig` CONFIG_PATH precedence bug** â€” does not prefer primary over legacy `CODEX_HOME` path when both exist
findings.fix_direction: Fix precedence order to match documented model (primary â†’ legacy); add explicit precedence test matrix

findings.claim: **AGENTS.md stale across 4 axes** â€” v0.1.x/Commit 9ac8a84/Generated 2026-03-01/"87 files, 2071 tests" vs reality v1.2.7/1f6da97/225 files/3418 tests
findings.fix_direction: Regenerate AGENTS.md via `/init-deep` or equivalent; make generation a release gate

findings.claim: **SSE non-streaming conversion buffers full stream up to 10MB and silently discards malformed JSON chunks**
findings.fix_direction: Surface malformed-chunk warnings via logger.warn; add structured parse-error taxonomy; consider streaming decode instead of buffer-then-parse

findings.claim: Recovery/session storage uses direct sync writes/deletes (no atomic temp+rename, no retry)
findings.fix_direction: Introduce shared atomic-write helper for recovery files + retry-safe deletes on Windows lock codes

findings.claim: Concurrency guard is in-process only â€” two CLI processes can race on shared `~/.codex/multi-auth` files
findings.fix_direction: Add advisory file locking OR journal/compare-and-swap for shared files

findings.claim: Active code supports V1â†”V3 only; no V2 migration path despite docs claiming V1/V2â†’V3
findings.fix_direction: Implement explicit V2 handling OR correct docs

findings.claim: Account-clear writes reset marker AFTER deleting artifacts â€” crash between looks like accidental loss
findings.fix_direction: Align account-clear ordering with flagged-clear flow: marker first

findings.claim: Flagged-account read retry omits `EPERM`
findings.fix_direction: Include `EPERM` in retryable flagged-read codes

findings.claim: Routing non-determinism â€” PID-based bias + cursor mutation makes reproduction hard
findings.fix_direction: Make deterministic mode default; gate PID bias behind explicit opt-in flag

findings.claim: Health + quota tracker state NOT persisted; resets on restart
findings.fix_direction: Persist routing state OR explicitly mark ephemeral + avoid "stable" health claims

findings.claim: `lib/health.ts` stale vs live AccountManager state â€” uses wrong field names
findings.fix_direction: Rebuild health report from AccountManager directly OR delete stale abstraction

findings.claim: Stream failover bypasses server-error policy path â€” `5xx` bursts on fallback don't update shared cooldown
findings.fix_direction: Reuse `evaluateFailurePolicy()` helper inside stream failover

findings.claim: Callback server doesn't eager-close on terminal outcomes; `close()` doesn't await shutdown
findings.fix_direction: Close immediately after terminal outcomes; convert mismatch/duplicate-code paths into explicit terminal results

findings.claim: Token freshness trusts persisted `expires`/`expiresAt` only â€” doesn't decode JWT `exp`
findings.fix_direction: Fall back to decoded JWT `exp` when metadata missing; treat missing expiry as refresh-needed

findings.claim: Access tokens + refresh tokens both stored plaintext JSON (file mode 0600)
findings.fix_direction: Minimize access-token caching OR move secrets to OS keychain

findings.claim: Port 1455 duplicated across server bind + status copy + oauth-success.html instead of derived from single parsed redirect URI
findings.fix_direction: Parse redirect URI once; feed server bind + UI copy + html from shared helpers

findings.claim: Manual-paste callback returns `null` on state mismatch â€” surfaced as generic callback-miss text
findings.fix_direction: Return structured mismatch error; surface explicit state-mismatch in both flows

findings.claim: No distinct connect timeout â€” single total timeout for both connect + body/stream
findings.fix_direction: Add `connectTimeoutMs` separate from total + stall

findings.claim: Observability uneven â€” trace ID / account ID / attempt # not uniformly attached across retry/failover branches
findings.fix_direction: Define log schema with mandatory correlation fields; structured logger with required keys

findings.claim: Deprecation/sunset headers logged in success path only â€” not in error paths
findings.fix_direction: Log deprecation headers in both success + error handling

findings.claim: Mid-stream failover intentionally disabled after first byte â€” users see hard error mid-generation
findings.fix_direction: Document limitation; consider opt-in "resume with marker" for idempotent prompts

findings.claim: `JSON.parse` surface is 59 calls across 31 files; schema validation centralized in single `lib/schemas.ts` not applied at parse boundaries
findings.evidence: I-03, I-04; `lib/schemas.ts`; high clusters in request-init, runtime/request-init, storage, recovery, fetch-helpers
findings.fix_direction: Wrap `JSON.parse` call sites with `safeParse*` helpers from `lib/schemas.ts`; add schemas for currently-unvalidated payloads

findings.claim: Dual-linter stack (eslint + biome) without documented scope separation
findings.fix_direction: Adopt one OR document scope split (biome=format, eslint=correctness)

findings.claim: `prepare` hook installs husky on every `npm install` â€” mutates `.git/hooks/` as side effect
findings.fix_direction: Document side effect prominently in CONTRIBUTING; consider opt-in install

findings.claim: Env var surface 11+ vars; no central env-schema
findings.fix_direction: Centralize env validation via `z.object()` in `lib/schemas.ts`; parse `process.env` at startup

findings.claim: `settings-hub.ts` ~2100 LOC â€” overgrown file mixing theme/account/sync/diagnostics/experimental
findings.evidence: G-01, JN-03; AGENTS.md Â§WHERE TO LOOK
findings.fix_direction: Split by sub-concern (see Section 8 Refactor R1)

findings.claim: `auth list` empty-storage message drift â€” test expects "Storage was intentionally reset." but code outputs "No accounts configured." / "Storage: <path>" / "Storage health: empty"
findings.fix_direction: Align code output to documented messaging or update tests after agreeing on canonical message

findings.claim: `--json` coverage unclear across subcommand surface (confirmed on `report`, `doctor`, `verify-flagged`; unverified on `list`, `switch`, `check`, `forecast`, `fix`)
findings.fix_direction: Audit each subcommand; standardize `--json` + deterministic exit codes + schema

findings.claim: Bifurcation `lib/codex-cli/` and `lib/codex-manager/` without documented boundary
findings.fix_direction: Document ownership map OR merge

findings.claim: Experimental settings flagged but no stability-promise policy
findings.fix_direction: Document experimental-tier semver policy

findings.claim: Error taxonomy implicit â€” no central `CodexError`/`AuthError`/`NetworkError` base class confirmed
findings.fix_direction: Introduce structured error hierarchy; map failures to stable error codes

findings.claim: Duplicate `1455` port constant across auth, server, copy, html (cross-ref C-AUTH-04)
findings.fix_direction: Derive from shared helper

findings.claim: 6 tmp files at repo root (`tmp-flagged.json.*.tmp`, `tmp-accounts.marker`) â€” test-cleanup leakage
findings.fix_direction: Move tests to temp dirs via `os.tmpdir()`; use shared retry cleanup helper

findings.claim: CHANGELOG drift check incomplete â€” v1.2.5/6/7 vs `git log v1.2.4..HEAD` not cross-referenced
findings.fix_direction: Run CHANGELOG check per release; add CI gate

findings.claim: Semver over v1.2.4â€“v1.2.7 â€” no 2.x breaking changes; need to verify no silent breaking behaviors in minors
findings.fix_direction: Add behavioral-change flag in CHANGELOG entries

findings.claim: Non-streaming SSE conversion buffers full stream up to 10MB in memory before parse
findings.fix_direction: Streaming decode OR bounded chunk count

findings.claim: Hot paths (request pipeline, SSE parser, account selection, storage writes, token refresh) lack benchmarks
findings.fix_direction: Add micro-benchmarks for top-3 hot paths

findings.claim: PKCE entropy is "probable strong" â€” generator lives in external dep, not audited in-repo
findings.fix_direction: Add regression test asserting `S256` + document trust boundary

findings.claim: Token endpoint + authorize endpoint hardcoded â€” no allowlist abstraction
findings.fix_direction: Centralize behind small allowlisted resolver for test/regional variants

findings.claim: Auth storage corruption recovery works but silent â€” no operator-visible signal when WAL/backup path taken
findings.fix_direction: Emit audit log when recovery path used

findings.claim: `docs/reference/storage-paths.md` references non-existent `deriveProjectKey`; code exports `getProjectStorageKey`
findings.fix_direction: Update docs

findings.claim: Recovery readers silently skip unreadable files (no corruption signal)
findings.fix_direction: Log corruption counts/paths

findings.claim: `docs/reference/settings.md` precedence rule not formally verified
findings.fix_direction: Add formal precedence table

findings.claim: Fallback 429 path hardcodes `"quota"` reason in one branch; primary passes `stableAccountKey`
findings.fix_direction: Align fallback branch with primary

findings.claim: Empty-response retry after SSE conversion may trigger unnecessary round-trip
findings.fix_direction: Add log; bounded count

findings.claim: Test output contains stray PowerShell node.exe error lines on Windows â€” harness brittleness
findings.fix_direction: Investigate stderr redirection

findings.claim: Test import phase 40s dominates startup
findings.fix_direction: Profile module graph for lazy-import opportunities

findings.claim: No perf regression CI gate; bench results not baselined
findings.fix_direction: Add perf CI with bench baseline commits

findings.claim: Repeated regex compilation not fully verified; potential hot-path trap
findings.fix_direction: Targeted `new RegExp(` scan

findings.claim: Property/chaos catalogs not explicitly inventoried in this audit
findings.fix_direction: Document invariants property-tested + failures chaos-injected

findings.claim: Dead code scan incomplete (ts-prune not run)
findings.fix_direction: Run `ts-prune` pass; file findings
